query: SELECT e.id, e.title, e.isActive, e.categoryId, c.id as cat_id, c.name as cat_name, c.isActive as cat_active FROM experiences e LEFT JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id ORDER BY e.id LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT e.id, e.title, e.isActive, e.categoryId, c.id as cat_id, c.name as cat_name, c.isActive as cat_active FROM experiences e LEFT JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id ORDER BY e.id LIMIT 15;
